title: Philips Avent Anti-Colic Bottle with AirFree Vent, 4oz, with Flow 1 Nipples, 0m+, 4pk, Clear, SCY701/04
clean_title: philips avent anti-colic bottle with airfree vent, 4oz, with flow 1 nipples, 0m+, 4pk, clear, scy701/04
description: Philips Avent Anti-colic with AirFree vent bottles are designed to reduce feeding issues: such as colic, gas, and reflux. The unique AirFree vent is designed to draw air away from the nipple keeping it full of milk to avoid air ingestion. This vent also keeps the nipple full of milk even when the bottle is held horizontal, allowing for upright feeding. Feeding in an upright position can help to reduce reflux and aid in digestion. The nipple shape is designed for a secure latch for a comfortable feed. The bottle is easy to clean and assemble with few parts. The AirFree vent is only one piece and is easy to clean without any special tools. The Anti-colic bottle features a valve, integrated into the nipple, that reduces vacuum buildup and reducing air into your baby’s tummy. The Anti-colic bottle can be used with or without the AirFree vent, giving you the option based on your baby’s feeding needs. The soft silicone nipple is available in different flow rates for babies of all ages, flows 1-4. We recommend using the Philips Avent Anti-colic baby bottle with Philips Avent Anti-colic bottle nipples. Includes 4 4oz Anti-colic bottles with AirFree vent with Flow 1 nipples. SCY701/04

title: Philips Avent Natural Baby Bottles with Natural Response Nipples (Medium Flow, Flow 3), 9oz, 4-Pack, SCY903/04
clean_title: philips avent natural baby bottles with natural response nipples (medium flow, flow 3), 9oz, 4-pack, scy903/04
description: Philips Avent Natural baby bottles support the well-being of your baby so you can take the best care of yourself. The Natural Response nipple with the unique opening and tip lets your baby control the pace of the milk flow, releasing it only when actively drinking - just like babies do during breastfeeding. When pausing to swallow and breathe, no milk flows. Feeding feels as natural as from the breast! Easily combine breast and bottle feeding with a wide, soft and flexible nipple that mimics the shape and feel of a breast. It helps the baby to latch on and feed comfortably, using its natural rhythm. With the no-drip design, the nipple helps prevent spills and lost milk. An anti-colic valve integrated into the nipple is designed to reduce colic and discomfort by sending air away from your baby's tummy. The ergonomic shape makes it comfortable for parents to hold and easy for small fingers to grasp. Assembly is simple, with only a few parts, while the wide bottleneck makes filling and cleaning easy. Philips Avent Natural bottle is made from polypropylene, a BPA-free material. It works with all nipples and caps from the Natural Response range. It is totally natural for your baby to take 2-3 tries to get milk flowing from a new bottle. We have 5 different nipple flow rates for the Natural bottle - when looking for the right one, age is a guide, but your baby's approach to drinking and the feeding cues will help determine when to move to a higher or lower nipple flow rate. Suckling is a skill and some babies develop it quicker than others. That’s why some babies might initially benefit from our “First Flow” nipple (Nipple 0) before progressing to the Natural Response nipples. Switch to “First Flow” nipple when your baby takes longer than 20 minutes to drink 50 ml/1.7 oz using the Natural Response nipples. If feeding difficulties persist, consult a healthcare professional. ¹ IQVIA Health ProVoice Survey 2025, USA. *#1 brand recommended by moms worldwide. Based on an online satisfaction survey conducted globally with 10,109 users of mother & childcare brands and products in 2023.
